question: Average website sign-ups per year are shown in the chart. Which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The latest year shows a sharp decline compared to previous years.
options.B: The chart does not provide enough information to judge the full-year trend for the latest year.
options.C: The latest year has the lowest sign-ups of the entire period, even for the full year.
options.D: The latest year proves that website sign-ups are now permanently declining.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 4 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (385 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,143 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
